ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day for intraday data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "log10_volume" REAL /* Logarithm (base 10) of the trading volume */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the stock for the day */,
  "percent_difference" REAL /* Percentage difference between the current day's close price and the previous day's close price */,
  "delta" REAL /* Change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score representing market sentiment */,
  "sentiment_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment source */,
  "predicted_close_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price from machine learning models */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_sentiment_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_source_id") REFERENCES sentiment_sources ("sentiment_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock symbol */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_sources" (
  "sentiment_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
